tools.name: connectAccount
tools.description: Connect a social media account for a client

tools.name: getAccountSpecs
tools.description: Get platform specifications (character limits, supported features) for a social platform

tools.name: createPost
tools.description: Create a new content post for scheduling or immediate publishing

tools.name: listPosts
tools.description: List content posts with optional filters

tools.name: getPost
tools.description: Get a single content post with assets, versions, and approvals

tools.name: deletePost
tools.description: Soft-delete or cancel a content post

tools.name: schedulePost
tools.description: Schedule a post to publish at a specific time, creating PublishJobs per platform

tools.name: publishNow
tools.description: Publish a post immediately with high priority

tools.name: listScheduled
tools.description: List scheduled posts as a calendar view

tools.name: cancelScheduled
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post or a specific publish job

tools.name: getPublishLog
tools.description: Get detailed publish log entries for a publish job

tools.name: listPublishJobs
tools.description: List publish jobs with optional filters

tools.name: trackCampaign
tools.description: Create, update, or list social campaigns

tools.name: addCampaignActivity
tools.description: Log an activity on a campaign

tools.name: manageCampaignMembers
tools.description: Add, list, or update campaign members

tools.name: analyzeEngagement
tools.description: Analyze engagement metrics for published social posts
